subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Give thanks for what We have shown thee of the fire of Our Lote-Tree, and We have witnessed thy burning ardor in the love of God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن ان اشکر بما اریناک نار سدرتی و راینا اشتعالک فی حب الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @goodly deeds; actions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
